faqs.question: How long does a typical interior design project take?
faqs.answer: The timeline varies based on the scope and size of the project. A single room renovation typically takes 2-4 weeks, while a complete home interior project can take 45-90 days. Commercial projects may take 60-120 days depending on complexity. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faqs.question: What is the cost of interior design services at Buildcare?
faqs.answer: Our pricing depends on the scope of work, materials selected, and project size. Residential interiors start from ₹8 lakhs for a 2BHK apartment. We offer customized packages to suit different budgets without compromising on quality. Contact us for a free, detailed quotation.

faqs.question: Do you provide a free consultation?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer a free initial consultation where our designers visit your space, understand your requirements, discuss design ideas, and provide a preliminary estimate. This helps both parties align expectations before starting the project.

faqs.question: What materials do you use for modular kitchens?
faqs.answer: We use premium materials including marine plywood (BWR grade), HDHMR boards, solid wood, and high-quality laminates from brands like Merino, Greenlam, and Century. For countertops, we offer granite, quartz (Caesarstone, Kalinga Stone), and Corian. All hardware is sourced from Hettich, Hafele, or Blum.

faqs.question: Do you handle the complete project or just design?
faqs.answer: Buildcare offers end-to-end solutions—from initial design concept to final handover. This includes design, material procurement, civil work, carpentry, electrical, plumbing, painting, and final styling. We manage everything so you don't have to.

faqs.question: What warranty do you provide on your work?
faqs.answer: We provide a comprehensive warranty: 10 years on modular furniture structure, 5 years on hardware, 1 year on painting work, and lifetime support for maintenance guidance. Specific warranty terms are detailed in the project agreement.

faqs.question: Can I see your previous work before deciding?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! You can explore our portfolio on this website, visit our showroom for material samples and mock setups, or we can arrange site visits to completed projects (with client permission). We also provide 3D renders before execution begins.

faqs.question: Do you work on projects outside your city?
faqs.answer: Yes, we undertake projects across India. We have executed projects in Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, Chennai, and several tier-2 cities. For outstation projects, we have a dedicated team and local partners to ensure seamless execution.

faqs.question: How do you handle project payments?
faqs.answer: We follow a milestone-based payment structure: 30% advance to begin work, 30% at mid-project milestone, 30% upon material delivery and installation, and 10% upon final handover and satisfaction. All payments are documented with proper invoicing.

faqs.question: What if I want to make changes during the project?
faqs.answer: Minor changes during execution are accommodated at no extra cost. For significant design changes, we provide a revised quotation and timeline. We recommend finalizing the design during the 3D rendering stage to minimize mid-project changes.
